title: Benchmark percents
description: Find common percentages (1%, 10%, 20%, 25%, 50%, and multiples of 100%) of whole numbers.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is $1\%$ of $700$?**  
*Hint: We can think of $1\%$ as a common fraction.*

[[☃ numeric-input 1]]
hints:
**Percent** (using the symbol $\%$) means the rate per $100$.

We can write $\blueE{1\%}$ as a fraction to make it faster to multiply the rate by $\maroonD{700}$.
